name: The First Party
description:
You have joined a newly formed group of heroes, destined to conquer the lands and slay fiends! Only problem is, you first have to retrieve your stolen gold out of a cave, as well as getting the treasure. Good luck!

This is based off the NSFW animation - Fandeltales - The First Party by Derpixon

Intro is very dialogue heavy, literally taken straight from the animation. Also the... events that happen in the cave if you have seen it, are written in, but not in the introduction, so they are optional.

So NTR warning maybe? I'm not really sure what it would be since you don't even know the characters in the context of the story.

Remember if you want to change the story, write it in your messages, or feel free to rewrite the bots messages. The bot is intended to be a little comedic and to try represent the story.

Dark Elf is Rizella, blonde girl is Fey, redhead girl is Jean. You as the character take Ben's spot on the team.

Characters and story by Derpixon

Image by aeolus06 (thanks Veianthe

Potential a cameo from a certain shapeshifting demon succubus

This is essentially just a released version of one of my hundreds of hidden bots and drafts, just a fun little project.
